blocks.text: Opening Balance Sheet Adjustment on January 1, 2018
As a result of applying the modified retrospective method to adopt ASC 606, the following amounts on our Consolidated
Balance Sheet were adjusted as of January 1, 2018 to reflect the cumulative effect adjustment to the opening balance of Retained earnings (in millions):
Prepaid expenses and other current assets 44.6 11.8 56.4
Effect of ASC 606 as of December 31, 2018 and for the Year Ended December 31, 2018
The following table summarizes the effect of adopting ASC 606 on our Consolidated Balance Sheet (in millions):
Prepaid expenses and other current assets 67.3 (14.4) 52.9
